summary: A holiday travel-tip PSA in which three CBP officers (an agriculture specialist, an agriculture canine supervisor, and a CBP officer) at Washington Dulles airport speak to camera, each giving a tip about declaring food, agricultural products, and currency/merchandise. It uses a festive red-snowflake overlay frame and lower-thirds but is a straight talking-head interview/PSA driven by speech, not a music-driven cinematic or genre piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: Declare all agriculture products—like meats; Have a happy holidays!; Cassandra Casperson
